---
title: "Overview"
toc: true
toc-location: left
toc-depth: 2
---

**Presenter:** William Song

## Schedule

| Time | Duration | Module |
|------|----------|--------|
| [10:00 AM](module1.html) | 30 min | **Module 1:** Introduction to Data Science Tools |
| [10:30 AM](module2.html) | 45 min | **Module 2:** Python and SQL Together |
| 11:15 AM | 10 min | *Morning Break* |
| [11:25 AM](module3.html) | 60 min | **Module 3:** Data Wrangling with pandas |
| 12:25 PM | 45 min | *Lunch* |
| [1:10 PM](module4.html) | 60 min | **Module 4:** Query Optimization |
| 2:10 PM | 10 min | *Afternoon Break* |
| [2:20 PM](module5.html) | 45 min | **Module 5:** Visualization Best Practices |
| 3:05 PM | | *End of session* |
